items.a: Yes. Every modpack is free to download. Support buttons exist if you'd like to fund continued development.

items.q: Do I need a Minecraft account?
items.a: Yes — a paid Java Edition account from Mojang is required.
Modrinth App or Prism Launcher are recommended. CurseForge App also works for our Forge packs.

items.q: Why does my framerate drop in modded?
items.a: Modded Minecraft is CPU-bound on most systems. Allocate appropriate RAM (see each modpack's specs) and use the recommended Java version.

items.q: Does Mac Native really run better on Apple Silicon?
items.a: Yes — every mod is tested on ARM64 native paths. Avoid Rosetta-only forks.

items.q: Where do I report a bug?
items.a: Open an issue on the modpack's GitHub repository, or ping us in Discord.
Streaming is encouraged. Redistribution requires written permission.
